title: Certs not propagated on hyperV
body:
### Issue Description

HTTP_PROXY and Cert files are not propagated into the machine on start

### Steps to reproduce the issue

Steps to reproduce the issue
1. set  HTTP_PROXY, SSL_CERT_FILE, SSL_CERT_DIR 
2. podman machine ssh printenv

### Describe the results you received

Certs propagated into the machine

### Describe the results you expected

See that the vars are not set


### Additional environment details

HyperV

comments.body: A friendly reminder that this issue had no activity for 30 days.
